headline: Do Wall Street Analysts Like News Corporation Stock?
summary: While News Corporation has struggled to keep up with the broader market over the past year, analysts remain reasonably upbeat about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Miami Dominates, Los Angeles Fades, and Canadian Buyers Cautiously Return: Realtor.com® Tracks Global Home Shopping Trends
summary: New research from Realtor.com® reveals a shifting landscape for international home shopping demand across the United States. In the first quarter of 2026, international home shoppers accounted for 1.6% of online shopping demand on Realtor.com®, up from 1.2% in the first quarter of 2020. Miami held its place as the top U.S. destination for international buyers, drawing 10.3% of all international online views.
